description.unified: Deals ATK Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec. [God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.

Dashes behind the enemy and deals ATK Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by [24%->30%] for [5 sec->4 sec]. [God's Proxy] : Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied [600->500] higher.

Deals ATK Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [1 sec->2 sec]. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills. [God's Proxy] : ATK increases by 264*(1+0.3*Skill Level), Attack Speed by [(added) 30%], Physical Evasion by [(added) 300], Normal Attack DMG by [100%->150%], and Status Resistance by [(added) 600]. This effect cannot be dispelled.

Magic DEF increases by [ATK 135 -> Magic DEF 85]*(1+0.3*Skill Level), and Magic Evasion increases by [360->250]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [20%->30%], and damage taken is reduced by [20%->30%].

dark.unified: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by [(added) 100%] [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1000].

light.unified: Mana cost is reduced by [(added) 1000] [(removed) Damage increases by 50%].

dark.unified: On hit, reduces the target’s Physical DEF by [(added) 35% for 10 sec] [(removed) increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec].

light.unified: Reduces Physical DMG taken by [(added) 25%] during the duration [(removed) Physical Evasion increases by 600].

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [(added) 1000], but damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [34%->100%] during the duration.

light.unified: Physical Evasion increases by [(added) 150]. On evasion, restores [(added) 5%] of Max HP. This effect can only trigger once every [(added) 3 sec] [(removed) ATK increase amount increases by 50%].

dark.unified: Damage taken from Heroes is reduced by [(added) 15%] [(removed) On evasion, restores 6% of Max HP every 3 sec].

description.unified: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max [5->10] times and is irremovable.

dark.unified: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to [60%->80%] of ATK. Applied at [120%->160%] against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
